description.content:
Performs the login. Takes in an plain text email and password, matching the owner's login information for [https://my.teslamotors.com/user/login](https://my.teslamotors.com/user/login).
Returns a `access_token` which is passed along as a header with all future requests to authenticate the user.
You must provide the `Authorization: Bearer {access_token}` header in all other requests.
The current client ID and secret are [available here](http://pastebin.com/YiLPDggh)
Wakes up the car from the sleep state. Necessary to get some data from the car.
Wakes up the car from the sleep state. Necessary to get some data from the car.

Sets valet mode on or off with a PIN to disable it from within the car. Reuses last PIN from previous valet session.
Valet Mode limits the car's top speed to 70MPH and 80kW of acceleration power. It also disables Homelink, Bluetooth and
Wifi settings, and the ability to disable mobile access to the car. It also hides your favorites, home, and work
locations in navigation.
Resets the PIN set for valet mode, if set.
Opens and unlocks the charge port.

item.name: Tesla Set Charge Limit to Standard

request.name: Tesla Set Charge Limit to Standard

description.content: Set the charge mode to standard (90% under the new percentage system introduced in 4.5).

item.name: Tesla Set Charge Limit to Max Range

request.name: Tesla Set Charge Limit to Max Range

description.content: Set the charge mode to max range (100% under the new percentage system introduced in 4.5). Use sparingly!
Set the charge limit to a custom percentage.
Set the maximum Charge Current in Amps
Start charging. Must be plugged in, have power available, and not have reached your charge limit.
Stop charging. Must already be charging.
Set the temperature target for the HVAC system.
Start the climate control system. Will cool or heat automatically, depending on set temperature.
Enable or Disable Bioweapon Defense Mode on equipped vehicles.

item.name: Tesla Set the Climate Keeper mode

request.name: Tesla Set the Climate Keeper mode

item.name: Tesla Enable or Disable Cabin Overheat Protection

request.name: Tesla Enable or Disable Cabin Overheat Protection

description.content: Enable or Disable Cabin Overheat Protection
Set the heating level of a seat heater
Set the cooling level of a seat heater
Enables or disables automatic control of a seat heater/coooler
Controls the car's panoramic roof, if installed.
Start the car for keyless driving. Must start driving within 2 minutes of issuing this request.
Open the trunk or frunk. Currently inoperable.
Retrieve a list of your owned vehicles (includes vehicles not yet shipped!)
Determines if mobile access to the vehicle is enabled.
Returns the state of charge in the battery.

description.content: Returns the driving and position state of the vehicle.
Returns various information about the GUI settings of the car, such as unit format and range display.
Returns the vehicle's physical state, such as which doors are open.

description.content: Get a list of nearby charging sites

The Tesla Motors Owner API provides programmatic access to Tesla vehicles for monitoring state data (charge, climate, drive, vehicle config) and executing remote commands (wake up, lock/unlock doors, control climate, manage charging, control trunk, media playback, and more).

Contact Support:
 Name: Tesla Developer Support
